profile.name: Taha Elkholy
profile.title: Software Engineer | Flutter Developer
profile.summary: Software Engineer specializing in Flutter mobile development with 3+ years of experience building high-performance Flutter applications for iOS and Android. Delivered 6+ production apps with 12K+ downloads using Clean Architecture, modern state management, and scalable architectures with full CI/CD pipelines and app store deployment. Seeking a role within a structured team where engineering quality is a priority.

bullets: Delivered 3 production-grade Flutter applications serving 5K+ active users across social networking,transportation, and utility domains.

Architected a multi-brand solution using Flutter Flavors across 2 deployments, eliminating duplicated codebases by enabling separate databases, branding, and deployment pipelines from a single codebase.
Engineered end-to-end CI/CD pipelines automating 8 store targets across iOS and Android — reducing each release to a single branch push delivered in under 15 minutes.
Led code reviews and technical mentoring for 1 junior developer at a time, enforcing Clean Architecture principles and maintaining codebase consistency across the team.
Coordinated async delivery across a UK-based remote team, contributing to sprint planning, technical documentation, and architecture decisions.
Developed 2 production-grade Flutter applications for electric vehicle (EV) charging management and e-mobility services, serving users across 7 countries in the MENA region.
Integrated Google Maps APIs to display 500+ real-time charging stations, enabling station discovery, route planning, and AI-powered range calculation across the platform.
Collaborated cross-functionally with embedded systems engineers, UI/UX designers, and backend developers, delivering features across 12+ sprint cycles within Agile 2-week cadences.
Improved application stability by implementing 100+ unit tests covering use cases, repositories, and core services, reducing regression risk throughout the development lifecycle.
Designed and built an orphan sponsorship platform managing 120+ child profiles with secure donation tracking, supporting one-time and recurring monthly contributions.
Implemented Firebase Auth and Firestore for real-time data sync and secure user management with role-based access control.
Built a secure logistics and payment application from scratch, engineering a sub-1-second NFC payment transaction flow that significantly streamlined the user checkout experience.
Sole mobile developer on the project: designed the architecture, selected libraries, and managed app store submission end-to-end.

training.title: Flutter Boot Camp
training.description: Completed intensive 3-month professional training in Flutter development, Clean Architecture, and SOLID principles.

certificates.title: Flutter & Dart – The Complete Development Course

productionApps.name: EV Cozmo

productionApps.name: عطريقك
productionApps.description: Connects drivers and passengers heading to the same destination. Trip posting, booking, real-time GPS tracking, in-app chat. Built with Flutter Flavors supporting 2 separate brands from a single codebase.

productionApps.name: HNE Futures
productionApps.description: EV charging session management with real-time hardware-software integration, serving users across 7 countries in the MENA region.

productionApps.name: الأربعين النووية
productionApps.description: Offline-first app for browsing and studying the 40 Hadith of Al-Nawawi. Originally built as a native Android app, later migrated to Flutter.

productionApps.name: صلة
productionApps.description: Smart platform for submitting complaints and reports easily and securely. Detailed report submission supported by photos and geographic location. Offline-first architecture.
